title: Compare CLI vs API costs for Anthropic

log.context: Compare CLI vs API costs for Anthropic

Done. Posted the cost comparison to Discord replying to koole__'s message. Key findings:

- **Max sub**: $100-200/mo flat, but rate limits are a real constraint (Sonnet already exhausted this cycle)
- **API pricing**: Opus 4.6 at $5/$25 per 1M tokens, Sonnet at $3/$15, Haiku at $1/$5
- **Estimated API cost** for our workload: roughly $150-300/mo depending on congress session volume
- **Recommendation**: Hybrid approach — keep Max for interactive Claude Code work, use API directly for high-volume...(truncated)
